title: Currency Exchange Rate Calculator - Live Rates
description: Free currency exchange rate calculator. Convert between major world currencies with approximate rates. Quick and easy currency conversion tool.
keywords: currency exchange rate calculator, currency converter, exchange rate calculator, money converter, forex calculator
intro: Convert between major world currencies. Enter an amount and select currencies to see the converted value.

faq.a: Exchange rates are determined by supply and demand in the foreign exchange market, influenced by interest rates, inflation, and economic stability.

faq.q: What is the spread in currency exchange?
faq.a: The spread is the difference between buy and sell rates. Banks and exchange services charge this as their fee.
These are approximate reference rates. For actual transactions, check with your bank or exchange service for current rates.
